title: elaphoglossum erythrolepis
intro: Elaphoglossum erythrolepis, also known as the Red-stemmed Elaphoglossum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to the presence of certain polyphenolic compounds. The medicinal properties of Elaphoglossum erythrolepis are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially lowering blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts or infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
